# services.redis

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.redis`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.redis.appendOnly` | `boolean` | By default data is only periodically persisted to disk, enable this option to use an append-only file for improved persistence. |
| `services.redis.bind` | `null or string` | The IP interface to bind to. |
| `services.redis.dataDir` | `null or absolute path` | Data directory for the redis database. |
| `services.redis.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the redis database service. |
| `services.redis.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Additional text to be appended to redis.conf . |
| `services.redis.package` | `absolute path` | This option specifies the redis package to use |
| `services.redis.port` | `signed integer` | The port for Redis to listen to. |
| `services.redis.unixSocket` | `null or absolute path` | The path to the socket to bind to. |
